acceptance.proof: Two private serialized repeats bind one pinned official outlet response to the unchanged production requester on one bounded active IPv4 destination path with matching source, finite completion, and cleanup.
Production requester bytes remain exact and damaged pin, group, requester-byte, interface, count, source, deadline, cleanup, limitation, and authority mutations reject.
Owner, Standard, public-boundary, documentation/instruction, and workflow gates pass without production or authority widening.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; keep the official binary, private driver/harness inputs, raw records, interface/endpoints, diagnostics, environment, and machine identity private; production bytes must remain unchanged.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the opposite-direction observation separately from broad compatibility.
Record exact finite composition and limitations.
Bind oracle, independent harness, raw/private evidence, and production source hashes.
Route focused damaged, Standard, and workflow checks.
Existing observation, cleanup, and authority separation rules apply.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review socket, protocol, evidence, and authority surfaces.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Existing LSL/Quest/Manifold and public/private lanes cover the observation.

non_scope: Production runtime/API/activation changes, requester-interface selection policy, interface enumeration/default selection/ambient fallback, other groups/ports/address families/interfaces, multiple queries/responses, retry policy/background workers, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied oracle source, raw records/endpoints/interface identity/diagnostics/environment, multicast portability, broad compatibility, routing/admission/commands, or Manifold authority.
objective: Observe only two serialized finite compositions of one pinned pylsl 1.18.2/liblsl 1.17/protocol 110 outlet responding to the unchanged capability-gated Rusty LSL explicit-destination requester at exact 239.255.172.215:16571 through one bounded active IPv4 host-interface path, with exact accepted requester bytes, one query/response, matching resolved source, deadline/cancellation, socket/membership cleanup as applicable, and sanitized hash-bound evidence.
outputs: One private independently controlled bounded official-outlet driver and test-only requester harness at the exact accepted source head with every attempt retained.
Two serialized official-outlet-to-production-requester active-interface repeats with finite completion, matching source, and cleanup.
One sanitized fixture/checker with hashes, exact dimensions, limitations, damaged mutations, documentation, policy, public-boundary, instruction, and workflow routes.
